news_rows.headline: 38% of altcoins near all-time lows, worse than FTX crash: Analyst
news_rows.summary: The crypto altcoin market is in turmoil as investor sentiment plummets and digital asset prices fail to recover from the October 2025 crash.

news_rows.headline: U.S. judge freezes BlockFills assets in dispute over 70 bitcoin with creditor Dominion Capital
news_rows.summary: A New York federal court barred the crypto trading firm from moving bitcoin tied to Dominion Capital, citing suspended withdrawals and insolvency concerns.

news_rows.headline: Core Scientific secures up to $1B credit from Morgan Stanley for data centers
news_rows.summary: The Bitcoin miner and data center operator said the financing will support infrastructure tied to high-density computing workloads, including artificial intelligence and HPC.

news_rows.headline: Son of U.S. government contractor, accused of stealing millions in seized crypto, arrested in France
news_rows.summary: John “Lick” Daghita was arrested in a joint FBI-France operation after allegations he siphoned tens of millions of dollars in crypto from government seizure wallets managed by his father’s company.

news_rows.headline: SoFi taps BitGo to provide infrastructure for bank-issued stablecoin
news_rows.summary: BitGo will support the rollout of US dollar-pegged stablecoin SoFiUSD, as US fintechs and banks expand digital dollar infrastructure following new federal legislation.

news_rows.headline: Sanctions evasions using crypto increased by 700% in 2025: Chainalysis
news_rows.summary: Russia, Iran and North Korea expanded their use of stablecoins, hacked funds and state-linked exchanges to move more than $100 billion onchain to evade international sanctions.

news_rows.headline: FBI arrests custody company CEO‘s son over alleged $46M crypto theft
news_rows.summary: FBI director Kash Patel posted a photo a handcuffed John Daghita, as well as one of seized items including cash, thumb drives, a phone and devices resembling hardware wallets.

news_rows.headline: CleanSpark sold 97% of February bitcoin production to fund AI pivot
news_rows.summary: The cash flow generated will support the bitcoin miner's expansion into AI and high-performance computing data centers.

news_rows.headline: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news_rows.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

news_rows.headline: Crypto for Advisors: Tokenization offers always-on global investment access
news_rows.summary: Using blockchain technology, tokenization is creating a new, always-on investment market, giving people worldwide easy and fractional access to wealth-building assets.
